hero.title: Build typed agents
hero.description: A Rust-first runtime for composing agents, tools, and reliable execution paths.

messages.assistantIntro: Share the goal, constraints, and existing context. We will clarify the problem before choosing the smallest viable path.
messages.userQuestion: We should define the Agent Runtime boundaries without adding layers for speculative future extensions.
messages.assistantAnswer: Start with the three real boundaries: the run loop, model calls, and tool execution. Extract another trait only when a second implementation or a concrete isolation need appears.
